title: Create: Perfect Warfare
description: The best create mod modpack for your warfare needs (complex understanding of things may be required).
body: If you are not satisfied with other modpacks, look no further unless you have to, for this modpack will be one of the better warfare modpacks out there. It adds immersive aircrafts, throwable bombs, create mod features and addons, etc. You can start a civilization with this modpack, or you can throw your "friends" under the bus by creating a create mod tank. A special feature of this modpack is the bombing feature. Hold flint and steel in your offhand and tnt in your main one. This modpack also has "Villlager Recruits" so you can command your villager armies.
